title: esquizo.com v8.0
body: [![](http://farm3.static.flickr.com/2613/4076952015_004d62fa99.jpg "esquizo.com v8.0 - new design")](http://www.esquizo.com) **A site built entirely on WordPress, aimed at a global audience and based on the information and participation of its visitors, which is why it’s very important to enhance usability and ensure a good user experience.** The [latest design of esquizo.com](http://www.xarop.com/esquizocom-v75/) didn’t even last a year. It never quite convinced me—it was a bit bland—and now that I’ve had some time, I’ve decided to change it. Initially, I was looking for a more magazine-style design, with more images and color, and I think I’ve achieved that thanks to the [eNews](http://www.elegantthemes.com/gallery/enews/) theme from Elegant Themes, which I’ve modified slightly (reducing the header size, adjusting layouts, and translating it into Spanish). I also took the opportunity to update to the latest version of [WordPress](http://www.xarop.com/category/cms/wordpress/) (2.8.5) and to clean up and update plugins, keeping only the necessary ones. Among them are an ad manager and the implementation of forums on the site itself. [esquizo.com](http://www.esquizo.com) is the website of psychiatrist Dr. Jordi Julià Zapata. It offers information, support, forums, and consultations regarding schizophrenia and other mental disorders. It is a non-profit informational website based on the voluntary work of doctors and specialists.
